attributes.title: [CouchDB OTel] Overview
attributes.description: Overview of Apache CouchDB health and performance: request latency, HTTP traffic, error rates, database operations, view reads, and resource saturation (file descriptors, open databases).

params.markdown:
## [CouchDB OTel] Overview

This dashboard provides an overview of Apache CouchDB health and performance:
- **Latency** — average request time (ms)
- **Traffic** — HTTP request rate, database operations, view reads
- **Errors** — HTTP 4xx and 5xx response rates
- **Saturation** — open file descriptors and databases
- **Bulk requests** — batch write volume

query.esql:
TS metrics-couchdbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchdbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE couchdb.average_request_time IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_ms = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(couchdb.average_request_time))

TS metrics-couchdbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchdbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE couchdb.average_request_time IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_ms = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(couchdb.average_request_time))

TS metrics-couchdbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchdbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE couchdb.httpd.requests IS NOT NULL
| STATS req_rate = SUM(RATE(couchdb.httpd.requests))

TS metrics-couchdbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchdbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE couchdb.httpd.requests IS NOT NULL
| STATS req_rate = SUM(RATE(couchdb.httpd.requests))

TS metrics-couchdbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchdbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE couchdb.httpd.responses IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(RATE(couchdb.httpd.responses)), errors = SUM(RATE(couchdb.httpd.responses)) WHERE attributes.http.status_code >= "400"
| EVAL error_pct = CASE(total > 0, errors / total, 0.0)

TS metrics-couchdbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchdbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE couchdb.httpd.responses IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(RATE(couchdb.httpd.responses)), errors = SUM(RATE(couchdb.httpd.responses)) WHERE attributes.http.status_code >= "400"
| EVAL error_pct = CASE(total > 0, errors / total, 0.0)

TS metrics-couchdbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchdbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE couchdb.file_descriptor.open IS NOT NULL
| STATS open_fds = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(couchdb.file_descriptor.open))

TS metrics-couchdbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchdbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE couchdb.file_descriptor.open IS NOT NULL
| STATS open_fds = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(couchdb.file_descriptor.open))

TS metrics-couchdbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchdbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE couchdb.average_request_time IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_ms = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(couchdb.average_request_time)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchdbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchdbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE couchdb.average_request_time IS NOT NULL
| STATS avg_ms = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(couchdb.average_request_time)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchdbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchdbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE couchdb.httpd.requests IS NOT NULL
| STATS requests = SUM(RATE(couchdb.httpd.requests)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.http.method
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchdbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchdbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE couchdb.httpd.requests IS NOT NULL
| STATS requests = SUM(RATE(couchdb.httpd.requests)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.http.method
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchdbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchdbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE couchdb.httpd.responses IS NOT NULL
| STATS responses = SUM(RATE(couchdb.httpd.responses)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.http.status_code
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchdbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchdbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE couchdb.httpd.responses IS NOT NULL
| STATS responses = SUM(RATE(couchdb.httpd.responses)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.http.status_code
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchdbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchdbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE couchdb.database.operations IS NOT NULL
| STATS ops = SUM(RATE(couchdb.database.operations)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.operation
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchdbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchdbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE couchdb.database.operations IS NOT NULL
| STATS ops = SUM(RATE(couchdb.database.operations)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.operation
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchdbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchdbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE couchdb.file_descriptor.open IS NOT NULL OR couchdb.database.open IS NOT NULL
| STATS open_fds = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(couchdb.file_descriptor.open)), open_dbs = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(couchdb.database.open)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchdbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchdbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE couchdb.file_descriptor.open IS NOT NULL OR couchdb.database.open IS NOT NULL
| STATS open_fds = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(couchdb.file_descriptor.open)), open_dbs = MAX(LAST_OVER_TIME(couchdb.database.open)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend)
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchdbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchdbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE couchdb.httpd.views IS NOT NULL
| STATS views = SUM(RATE(couchdb.httpd.views)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.view
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchdbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchdbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE couchdb.httpd.views IS NOT NULL
| STATS views = SUM(RATE(couchdb.httpd.views)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), attributes.view
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchdbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchdbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE couchdb.average_request_time IS NOT NULL
| STATS val = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(couchdb.average_request_time)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), couchdb.node.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchdbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchdbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE couchdb.average_request_time IS NOT NULL
| STATS val = AVG(AVG_OVER_TIME(couchdb.average_request_time)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), couchdb.node.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchdbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchdbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE couchdb.httpd.responses IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(RATE(couchdb.httpd.responses)), errors = SUM(RATE(couchdb.httpd.responses)) WHERE attributes.http.status_code >= "400" BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), couchdb.node.name
| EVAL val = CASE(total > 0, errors / total, 0.0)
| KEEP time_bucket, couchdb.node.name, val
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchdbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchdbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE couchdb.httpd.responses IS NOT NULL
| STATS total = SUM(RATE(couchdb.httpd.responses)), errors = SUM(RATE(couchdb.httpd.responses)) WHERE attributes.http.status_code >= "400" BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), couchdb.node.name
| EVAL val = CASE(total > 0, errors / total, 0.0)
| KEEP time_bucket, couchdb.node.name, val
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchdbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchdbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE couchdb.httpd.responses IS NOT NULL AND attributes.http.status_code == "409"
| STATS val = SUM(RATE(couchdb.httpd.responses)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), couchdb.node.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchdbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchdbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE couchdb.httpd.responses IS NOT NULL AND attributes.http.status_code == "409"
| STATS val = SUM(RATE(couchdb.httpd.responses)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), couchdb.node.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchdbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchdbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE couchdb.httpd.bulk_requests IS NOT NULL
| STATS val = SUM(RATE(couchdb.httpd.bulk_requests)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), couchdb.node.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchdbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchdbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE couchdb.httpd.bulk_requests IS NOT NULL
| STATS val = SUM(RATE(couchdb.httpd.bulk_requests)) BY time_bucket = BUCKET(@timestamp, 20, ?_tstart, ?_tend), couchdb.node.name
| SORT time_bucket ASC

TS metrics-couchdbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchdbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE couchdb.httpd.responses IS NOT NULL
| STATS responses_per_sec = SUM(RATE(couchdb.httpd.responses)) BY attributes.http.status_code
| SORT responses_per_sec DESC
| LIMIT 15

TS metrics-couchdbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchdbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE couchdb.httpd.responses IS NOT NULL
| STATS responses_per_sec = SUM(RATE(couchdb.httpd.responses)) BY attributes.http.status_code
| SORT responses_per_sec DESC
| LIMIT 15

TS metrics-couchdbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchdbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE couchdb.httpd.requests IS NOT NULL
| STATS requests_per_sec = SUM(RATE(couchdb.httpd.requests)) BY attributes.http.method
| SORT requests_per_sec DESC
| LIMIT 10

TS metrics-couchdbreceiver.otel-*
| WHERE data_stream.dataset == "couchdbreceiver.otel"
| WHERE couchdb.httpd.requests IS NOT NULL
| STATS requests_per_sec = SUM(RATE(couchdb.httpd.requests)) BY attributes.http.method
